sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43859" key="eu)erwthtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐερωτητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n43859.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good at questioning</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
